nasb.text: Also the fat of an animal which dies and the fat of an animal torn by beasts may be put to any other use, but you must certainly not eat it.

esv.text: The fat of an animal that dies of itself and the fat of one that is torn by beasts may be put to any other use, but on no account shall you eat it.

cnv.text: 自死的或被野獸撕裂的動物的脂肪，可以作別的用途，只是你們決不可吃。

ccb.text: 自然死亡或被野兽咬死的动物的脂肪也不可吃，但可以作其他用途。
